narrative.summary: Dinner AND dancing with natural wine - Saturday DJ nights, neighborhood fixture on College St

blocks.title: The Vibe
blocks.body:
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "Beautiful spot for dinner. The atmosphere is beautiful and cozy. The food is incredible and light with sharing plates that fit a wide variety of tastes. Highly recommend asking what their specials for the night are. The tuna tartare was a standout! This is an incredible spot for a date night. Definitely recommend."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "The duck confit was so tender and filling & was my first time trying a calamari with a sweeter sauce - highly recommended. The tuna tartar came with seaweed salad and roasted nori - super delish pairing. The beef tartar was solid too."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ "An absolute masterclass in atmosphere and vibes. I go here on a regular basis for the music and late night dancing. The sound system is incredible, and they spin vinyl. A lot of artists frequent here.

As if this already wasn’t enough, they have a delicious lunch/dinner menu cooked by some magical hands.
The pave fries are insane
Staff is super friendly and honestly a well rounded and really cool place to be

One of my favourite spots in the city, hands down"
